title: VaniCraft
description: Minecraft Client-Side Modpack: Boost Your Performance and Play on Any Vanilla Server with your own mods!
body:
**Minecraft Client-Side Modpack**: _Boost Your Performance and Play on Any Server_!

**Looking** for a _lightweight and effective_ modpack that boosts your performance by _over 58%?_ Look no further! My Minecraft modpack is completely _Client-Side_, meaning it requires _no server-side modifications_. You won’t have to worry about _compatibility issues_, no matter what server you play on, whether it’s a _vanilla_ or _modded_ server. 

**But don't forget!**, each modded server will need specific mods in your minecraft files but (again), _with this modpack_ you can go on _all vanilla server_ without any problems and a bonus, **a new way to play minecraft** !



**_Key Features:_**

- **Performance Boost**: Over 58% performance improvement for a smoother, faster gameplay experience.

- **Universal Compatibility**: Works on all vanilla servers without any restrictions.

- **Ease of Use**: Simple and quick installation with no risk of conflicts with other mods or servers.

- **Lightweight and Optimized**: A modpack optimized not to weigh down your game while enhancing its performance.


_**With this modpack, enjoy an optimal Minecraft experience, whether playing solo or on any vanilla server!**_
